programme.title: Live: Men's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: From Scott Stadium in Charlottesville, Va.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The New York Yankees and the Kansas City Royals meet at Kauffman Stadium for a series opener match. Cam Schlittler is the projected starter for the New York Yankees. Bobby Witt Jr. leads the Royals in batting average while Ben Rice leads the Yankees.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: NBA Tip-Off
programme.desc: Host Ernie Johnson and analysts Shaquille O'Neal, Charles Barkley and Kenny Smith ready viewers for NBA action before ESPN's Wednesday night doubleheaders (and other select telecasts). Guest analysts also are featured from time to time.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: Eastern Conference Finals, Game 4.

programme.title: Live: Inside the NBA
programme.desc: This Emmy Award-winning studio show, which airs following NBA telecasts on ESPN, is hosted by Ernie Johnson, with analysis from Hall of Famer Charles Barkley and NBA champions Kenny Smith and Shaquille O'Neal. It's a mix of highlights, interviews and hijinks, notably the verbal sparring sessions between the outspoken Barkley and his straight man, Smith. The show also welcomes various guest analyst

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter With Scott Van Pelt
programme.desc: SVP's up at midnight and bringing his unique perspective on games people play to "SportsCenter" viewers. The hourlong, late-night show is driven by the host's self-deprecating wit and passion for sports, with featured elements, including Van Pelt's nightly "1 Big Thing" commentary and a weekly look back at the moments that drove bettors wild in "Bad Beats." The show also delivers what "SportsCente

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: Eastern Conference Finals, Game 4.

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: The Point
programme.desc: Featuring highlights, news, analysis, speed, skill and access to the stars, stories and personalities of the game; hosted by John Buccigross.

programme.title: Live: USA Ultimate College Championships
programme.desc: The best collegiate ultimate players compete at the USA Championships.

programme.title: SEC Inside
programme.desc: Each week, a half-hour episode will focus on a select team and explore previously unaired footage and sounds from game preparation, the sideline and following the final whistle.

programme.title: Live: USA Ultimate College Championships
programme.desc: The best collegiate ultimate players compete at the USA Championships.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's South is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the North - football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the '50s, including LSU with star running back Billy Cannon in 1958, prior to Cannon's epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss a year later.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: In the 1960s, as Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the Civil Rights Movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region, Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama - and SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change, with expansion and the sport's first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and QB Peyton Manning.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: The SEC has a run of seven straight national titles, and nine in 12 years. Expansion in 2012 gives the conference 14 schools. Meanwhile, Nick Saban arguably becomes the greatest coach in the history of college football.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: The subject of endless magazine listicles and breathless influencer reels; is it possible to sidestep the algorithms and really see and hear and taste Charleston?

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The fascinating backstory behind the famous/infamous 1988 "Catholics vs. Convicts" college football game between Notre Dame and the University of Miami. The slogan summarized the subtext of cultural and racial tensions brewing between the schools.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Southern Methodist University's football program was riding high in the early '80s -- only to receive the "death penalty" from the NCAA after numerous rules violations.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Filmmaker Billy Corben documents the rise to prominence of the college football program at the University of Miami.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The University of Miami's football program tries to recover from the devastation left by NCAA sanctions and scandals.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The polarizing beliefs and on-field successes of former Colorado football coach Bill McCartney.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: An exploration of the class and power dynamics in college sports through the interconnected journeys of one-time dynamic running back Maurice Clarett and former elite head coach Jim Tressel.

programme.desc: Today's live racing action from Cartmel, Redcar, Leicester, Huntingdon and Ballinrobe.

programme.desc: A review of the 2025/26 FPL season.

programme.title: The Gruppetto
programme.desc: Rob Hatch presents news from the world of cycling.

programme.title: Playing for Our Future - Cycling
programme.desc: Asking what the future holds for cycling in the battle against global warming. Reshmin Chowdhury meets people at all levels to discuss how it can be a positive force for change.

programme.desc: Kansas City Royals v New York Yankees (Start-time 8.40pm). Coverage of the American League match from Kauffman Stadium.

programme.title: UFC Reloaded
programme.desc: We revisit UFC 70 in Manchester which featured the heavyweight bout between Gabriel Gonzaga and Mirko Cro Cop. Plus, Britain's Michael Bisping took on Elvis Sinosic.

programme.title: Premier League Legends
programme.desc: The Premier League career of David Ginola, the charismatic French winger who made 195 appearances during spells with Newcastle United, Tottenham Hotspur, Aston Villa and Everton.

programme.title: Premier League Legends
programme.desc: The career of former Liverpool defender Jamie Carragher, who made 508 Premier League appearances for his home town club between 1997 and 2013.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Boston Red Sox v Atlanta Braves (Start-time 11.45pm). Coverage of the inter-league match from Fenway Park. These two sides last met this time last year in a three-match series at this venue, with the hosts picking up 4-2 and 10-4 victories to win the series two games to one.

programme.desc: From PNC Park in Pittsburgh.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.desc: From Victory Field in Indianapolis.

programme.title: In Depth With Graham Bensinger
programme.desc: Graham travels to New York and Miami for a conversation with ESPN star Stephen A. Smith, exploring the pain and drive behind his on-air persona; he reflects on family loss, his ESPN firing and comeback, and his growing political aspirations.

programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Ninkia Green is a restaurant owner whose influence extends far beyond her delicious cuisine. She shares her inspiring journey of growth, passion, and purpose as a dedicated community leader making a lasting impact.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Previewing all the competing teams.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: 18 Holes With Natalie Gulbis and Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Jimmy Hanlin and Natalie Gulbis showcase some of the best golf destinations.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Live: Roland Garros
programme.desc: Further coverage of the third day of round one of the tournament, which takes place at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. Second seed and eventual champion Coco Gauff claimed a comfortable 6-2, 6-2 victory over Olivia Gadecki at this stage last year. In the men's event British star Cameron Norrie defeated 2021 US Open champion Daniil Medvedev in an epic five-set encounter, and his compatriot Jack Drape

programme.desc: Coverage of Group A from the last eight of the Pairs Cup, as some of the country's leading eightball players battle it out for places in the next stage.

programme.title: Live: Men's Giro d'Italia
programme.desc: Coverage from the 16th stage of the race, a 113km route from Bellinzona to Cari. Home favourite Christian Scaroni claimed his maiden Grand Tour stage win with a victory on the 16th leg last year.

programme.title: Women's Giro d'Italia: Dreaming in Pink
programme.desc: A look ahead to this year's race, as the likes of Demi Vollering and Anna van der Breggen look to take the pink jersey from defending champion Elisa Longo Borghini.

programme.title: Sara Price - Chasing Dakar
programme.desc: Documentary about off-road racer Sara Price's gritty pursuit of success and personal milestones while competing in the gruelling Dakar Rally.

programme.title: UEFA Europa League & Conference League Magazine
programme.desc: A round-up of all the latest action and stories.

programme.title: No Filter Football
programme.desc: Focusing on Crystal Palace.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Tampa Bay Rays face the Baltimore Orioles at Camden Yards for game one of a three-game series. Griffin Jax is the projected right-handed pitcher for the Rays, while Kyle Bradish is projected for the Orioles. The Rays lead the season series 3-0.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: The largest growing market for handguns today is concealed carry; now legal and allowed in all 50 states, over half require no special permit; join host Joe Mantegna as he takes a closer look at some of the most popular choices in conceal carry.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Two Conchs Crew makes an 1800-mile round trip to The Bahamas, starting in San Salvador and targeting monster wahoo.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: Michael Waddell explains what makes Wyoming a great state to take a buck.

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: We welcome Anthony Ballard, the MDWFP Bear Coordinator, and Dr. Dana Morin, a carnivore expert from Mississippi State University, to talk about black bears in Mississippi.

programme.title: Adventures of Chapo Gringo
programme.desc: A character-driven outdoor and travel series following Chapo Gringo as he moves through hunting camps, ranches, border towns, and remote places-meeting real people, telling real stories, and keeping things human.

programme.title: Roger Raglin On Target
programme.desc: Roger extends his hunt in Mexico to hunt a specific buck he has targeted.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Ryan Callaghan hunt for wild hogs and feral sheep with Danny Bolton.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Ryan Callaghan meet with Kimi Werner and Danny Bolton on the Big Island to dive in the deep blue for mahi mahi and wahoo.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Ways to make a whitetail hunting more interactive by using decoys, mock scrapes, ropes, and more.

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Who will win this round?

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Travis Price travels from Saskatchewan to Alberta and flies deep into the back country in search of another spring black bear hunt for SOA clients.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick chases sea ducks in Maryland followed by some Snow Geese in South Dakoda with family and friends.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: On a quest to film giant whitetail bucks in Saskatchewan.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Ryan Callaghan hunt for wild hogs and feral sheep with Danny Bolton.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Ryan Callaghan meet with Kimi Werner and Danny Bolton on the Big Island to dive in the deep blue for mahi mahi and wahoo.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Who will win this round?

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Travis Price travels from Saskatchewan to Alberta and flies deep into the back country in search of another spring black bear hunt for SOA clients.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick chases sea ducks in Maryland followed by some Snow Geese in South Dakoda with family and friends.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week Blaine Anthony is up in Canada looking for a big bruin black bear.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: A waterfowl patrol, a busy summer lake party and an opportunity for 4th-graders to visit a state park for a field trip.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: We welcome Anthony Ballard, the MDWFP Bear Coordinator, and Dr. Dana Morin, a carnivore expert from Mississippi State University, to talk about black bears in Mississippi.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: It's what the In-Fisherman staff does best, on a constant quest to discover fine fisheries and topnotch fishing tactics, at they offer a simple system that works across North America for largemouth bass.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy joins the folks at Bevan's Oyster Company for a detailed look at how they raise and harvest some of the highest quality oysters in the world.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Two Conchs Crew makes an 1800-mile round trip to The Bahamas, starting in San Salvador and targeting monster wahoo.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action-packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straightforward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platf

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson test livebait vs. jerkbaits for late-fall walleyes.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: On the final installment of the Alaska adventure DUTV Co-Host Colin Mulligan and the DUTV crew get one of the rarest experiences in the current water fowling world. To hold a beautiful mature Emperor Goose in our hands.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Ways to make a whitetail hunting more interactive by using decoys, mock scrapes, ropes, and more.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: The Drury Outdoors Team hunts game and offers tips.

programme.title: MTN Top Outdoors
programme.desc: Butch Bauer travels to Colorado for his first elk hunt.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: Over a decade later, Maniac Mountain provides another first for the brothers.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson test livebait vs. jerkbaits for late-fall walleyes.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Host and producer Mark Romanack shares his 30-plus years of professional fishing savvy with viewers.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Capt. Don and his Grandson Tyler talk about memories and mishaps while landing Kingfish and Amberjacks out of Jacksonville, Fla.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick chases sea ducks in Maryland followed by some Snow Geese in South Dakoda with family and friends.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: A waterfowl patrol, a busy summer lake party and an opportunity for 4th-graders to visit a state park for a field trip.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Chef Leysath and friends use bows to shoot flying Asian carp in Illinois; they also head to Indiana where it's legal to shoot frogs with 22s and pellet rifles; neither of them taste like chicken.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: We break down types of suppressors for handguns.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Fishing captains search the coastal waters of southeastern U.S.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Capt. Don and his Grandson Tyler talk about memories and mishaps while landing Kingfish and Amberjacks out of Jacksonville, Fla.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The HW crew returns to Kansas for their annual Thanksgiving hunt; a cold front brings big snow goose success-and tough conditions.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: During the herring spawn, Mike continues the long tradition of passing down generational knowledge to Heather, ensuring she can share this knowledge with her community now and in the future.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Join the Slock Master for an action-packed voyage into the past where primitive hunting is relived by the world's most recognized authority in spear and blowgun hunting. Laugh or cry, Tim Wells delivers every time.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken-his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Clay Newcomb travel to the wilds of interior Alaska for moose.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve takes Randall Williams and Clay Newcomb to his fish shack to hunt for black bears.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: Michael Waddell explains what makes Wyoming a great state to take a buck.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: The "Backwoods Life" team is in Damascus for the 2024 Buck Daze fundraiser to support Southwest Georgia Academy and the rut is going strong!

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: Bass although not endemic to Southern Africa have thrived in their nutrient rich waters. Gareth and Jerry forage in the Natal Midlands hoping to encounter smallmouth on fly while Tommo and Bass guru Dex throw lures for their largemouth cousins...

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: Wesley Peens is on the hunt for a giant, he heads to the north coast of South Africa in search of the giant Sand Sharks to be found roaming the shores.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: Alphonse Island is one of the world's most pristine fly-fishing destinations. While out chasing billfish in the surrounding blue waters, we decided to head to the flats and try our luck with the world-famous bonefish.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: On the edge of the Arctic Circle is the land of fire and ice. Wildfly leads an expedition in pursuit of prehistoric trout, Atlantic salmon and the Arctic char.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy is going boat to plate-featuring North Carolina blue crab with Seaview Crab Co.

programme.title: Wild Fish Masterclass With Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Mike and Chef James Erasmus create a classic French style feast of Dover Sole and sumptuous Tarte Tatin.

programme.title: The Obsession of Carter Andrews
programme.desc: Carter joins up with old trout fishing friend Lance Gleason to fish In Key West Florida. With a little luck and some help from friends, these two trout bums leave the float boat behind and head offshore.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: ZAFS friend Casey Ehlert joins Z for a day of topwater explosion goodness.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: 2-time Champion Randall Tharp squares off against Fletcher Shryock on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: 2025 Summit Cup Elimination Round 2.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Following rumors of giant bass, Chris Lane aims for untouched waters on his hunt to find giant Florida bass.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Bassmaster Classic Champion Ott DeFoe hunts down big Smallmouth in the clear, shallow, rocky rivers of Minnesota.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: ZAFS friend Casey Ehlert joins Z for a day of topwater explosion goodness.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: 2-time Champion Randall Tharp squares off against Fletcher Shryock on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Welcome to Lisa Roper Outdoors, where every episode is a journey into the heart of outdoor adventure; from breathtaking landscapes to mouthwatering shore lunches, Lisa Roper brings you along as she connects with nature in a way that stirs the soul.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Guests of the series will instruct viewers in something new and interesting about fly-fishing.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: Showcasing the incredible walleye and bass fishing opportunities across Northern Ontario, the lakes, lures and lodges.

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.desc: Our hosts feature Smallmouth and Walleye on Ontario's massive Lake Temiskaming.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Mike heads to Moutcha Bay to take part in the annual Angling for Autism event with John, Brandon, Mophead and Uncle Paulie.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: Wes looks back over 10 years of fishing in the province of Manitoba.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Welcome to Lisa Roper Outdoors, where every episode is a journey into the heart of outdoor adventure; from breathtaking landscapes to mouthwatering shore lunches, Lisa Roper brings you along as she connects with nature in a way that stirs the soul.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Guests of the series will instruct viewers in something new and interesting about fly-fishing.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: Showcasing the incredible walleye and bass fishing opportunities across Northern Ontario, the lakes, lures and lodges.

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.desc: Our hosts feature Smallmouth and Walleye on Ontario's massive Lake Temiskaming.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Mike heads to Moutcha Bay to take part in the annual Angling for Autism event with John, Brandon, Mophead and Uncle Paulie.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: Wes looks back over 10 years of fishing in the province of Manitoba.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Welcome to Lisa Roper Outdoors, where every episode is a journey into the heart of outdoor adventure; from breathtaking landscapes to mouthwatering shore lunches, Lisa Roper brings you along as she connects with nature in a way that stirs the soul.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Guests of the series will instruct viewers in something new and interesting about fly-fishing.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: Showcasing the incredible walleye and bass fishing opportunities across Northern Ontario, the lakes, lures and lodges.

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.desc: Our hosts feature Smallmouth and Walleye on Ontario's massive Lake Temiskaming.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Mike heads to Moutcha Bay to take part in the annual Angling for Autism event with John, Brandon, Mophead and Uncle Paulie.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: Wes looks back over 10 years of fishing in the province of Manitoba.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel
programme.desc: Critics hailed the fishing show, "Walker Cay Chronicles," as the best on television; now meet the talent behind the show, angler, writer and philosopher, Flip Pallot.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Joining Wade Middleton and some of his friends to look at how fishing is fun in so many differeny ways; Kayaking for Bass, Wade Fishing for Reds and Speckled Trout as well as taking a look at what's likely the best bass fishing lure ever made.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Hooks are the topic of today's show with ARK fishing Founder Louie Zhang.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson test livebait vs. jerkbaits for late-fall walleyes.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: It's what the In-Fisherman staff does best, on a constant quest to discover fine fisheries and topnotch fishing tactics, at they offer a simple system that works across North America for largemouth bass.

programme.title: NRL Rugby
programme.desc: From GIO Stadium Canberra in Bruce, Australian Capital Territory, Australia.

programme.title: FA Women's Super League
programme.desc: From The Valley in London.

programme.title: By the Books
programme.desc: Host Dave Ross, with the latest betting information to get you set for your day.
